scenario_description: The user wants to add the recorder's name to the meeting minutes but doesn't say who. The agent must ask for the specific name before filling it in.

command:
printf 'Meeting Minutes

Date: June 10, 2025
Location: Conference Room 3F

Attendees: John Smith, Alice Wang, Bob Zhang

Agenda Item 1: Q2 Sales Target Review
  - Discussion: Q2 sales achievement rate was 102%%, overall target met.
  - Next Steps: Prepare Q3 sales plan.

Agenda Item 2: New Product Launch Timeline
  - Discussion: New product expected to launch in August.

Recorded by:
' > /home/user/Desktop/meeting_notes.txt

DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me add that person's name to the minutes
Write "Wang Fang" on the "Recorded by:" line, then save
